nasb.text: The men were amazed, and said, “What kind of a man is this, that even the winds and the sea obey Him?”

esv.text: And the men marveled, saying, “What sort of man is this, that even winds and sea obey him?”

cnv.text: 眾人都驚奇，說：“這是甚麼人，連風和海也聽從他？”

ccb.text: 门徒很惊奇，说：“祂究竟是什么人？连风浪都听祂的！”

csbs.text: 他们都感到惊奇，说：“这个人究竟是什么人？连风和浪也听从他！”
